title: Rogun dam: the megaproject testing Europe’s Central Asian ambitions
summary_full: The Rogun dam is expected to reach 335 metres when completed, making it the world's tallest dam and the largest hydropower project ever supported by the EU
summary_public: The Rogun dam is expected to reach 335 metres when completed, making it the world's tallest dam and the largest hydropower project ever supported by the EU
